params.name: Sunflowers
params.source: Fungus Chest (1%), Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.1%)
params.description:
On Jun 9, 1888, Van Gogh painted the sunflowers in Arles of France.

This is the sixth painting of the Sunflower series. Under Van Gogh's interpretation, the sunflowers are all like blazing flames, so exquisite, captivating, and harmonious all at once. Elegant and delicate, with striking and bold brushstrokes, the sunflower has a raw impulse and enthusiasm. Van Gogh originally planned to draw twelve sunflowers to represent the twelve disciples of Christ, but unfortunately, he could not complete  …
